## Scope

Source file(s):

Change reason:

## Required Governance

- [ ] Source ownership/rights are clear.
- [ ] Checksums and inventory impact are expected.
- [ ] Parser profile and import manifest impact are understood.
- [ ] Generated artifacts will be regenerated by tooling.

## Verification

Required local checks:

```bash
python3 tools/quizbank_inventory.py --quizbank-dir QuizBank
python3 tools/quizbank_constitution_check.py --quizbank-dir QuizBank
python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"
```
